person_name: Amalasuntha, Queen of the Ostrogoths (regent, d. 535)
person_name_full: Amalasuntha, Queen of the Ostrogoths (regent, d. 535)
notes: Queen and regent of the Ostrogoths, known for her wisdom and political skill during the early 6th century.

docs.title: Letter 10004
docs.author: Cassiodorus
docs.subject_summary: Book 10, Letter IIII: SENATUI URBIS ROMAE THEODAHADUS
docs.excerpt: … my heart more than this: that our most wise queen chose me after the most exacting deliberation. I first experienced her justice so that I might later arrive at the grace of her promotion. For as you know, she required me to plead my legal cases alongside ordinary citizens. What nobility of spirit!
